instructions: ; NATIVE COMPILATION LOOP FOR INTENT: Storage
vsetvli t0, x0, e64, m8, ta, ma   ; Configure vector unit for VLEN=2048 (e64, m8 grouping)
; State Idle (ID: 0)
;   on write_block -> Writing
vfmv.v.f v5, 191.1240    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 1                  ; Load target state ID 1
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on read_block -> Reading
vfmv.v.f v5, 38.2248    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 2                  ; Load target state ID 2
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State Writing (ID: 1)
;   on commit -> Idle
vfmv.v.f v5, 76.4496    ; Load total energy cost (with 6.18% fee) into v5
vfsub.vv v1, v1, v5         ; Deduct energy cost from wide register v1 (mesh_energy)
li t1, 0                  ; Load target state ID 0
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
;   on rollback -> Idle
li t1, 0                  ; Load target state ID 0
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
; State Reading (ID: 2)
;   on close -> Idle
li t1, 0                  ; Load target state ID 0
vmv.v.x v0, t1              ; Write target state ID directly to v0 (state register)
